title: pistacia lentiscus var. multiflora
intro: Pistacia lentiscus var. multiflora, also known as Mastic or Chios mastiha, is a type of evergreen tree or shrub native to Greece, specifically the island of Chios. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues, including digestive problems, wounds, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Pistacia lentiscus var. multiflora include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement, essential oil, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine and modern wellness practices.
